details: DevJob should persist a durable unit of work with objective, instructions, acceptance criteria, allowed/prohibited paths, repository target hints, evidence references, validation references, lifecycle status, origin, creator, assignee, and result submission metadata. The first implementation should only establish the collaboration contract and lifecycle. It must not perform Git operations, repository mutation, autonomous execution, patch generation, patch validation, intent planning, scheduling, or workflow orchestration. DevJob should reference related artifacts and subsystems rather than owning them.
scope: Ageix coordination layer; pre-intent DevWorker collaboration foundation.
summary: Introduce DevJob as a governed coordination primitive for handoff between architects, DevWorkers, reviewers, and future automation.
title: DevJob Coordination Primitive
